description: Atlassian Confluence Data Center/Server edge CVEs — broken access control privesc (CVE-2023-22515) and OGNL template injection RCE (CVE-2023-22527). Detection-only version/endpoint fingerprints — NO state-changing OGNL.

confluence_broken_access_2023.description: CVE-2023-22515 — Confluence broken access control allowing an attacker to create an unauthorised administrator via the setup/bootstrap endpoints. Detection = confirm Confluence version + reachable setup endpoint; the admin-create flow is NOT performed.

probes.description: server-info.action returning Confluence version markers confirms the product/version family affected by CVE-2023-22515. Read-only version fingerprint.
setup administrator endpoint reachable post-install (200/302, not hard 403) indicates the CVE-2023-22515 access-control surface is exposed. Detection only — no account is created.

confluence_ognl_rce_2023.description: CVE-2023-22527 — Confluence OGNL template injection in the legacy Velocity template path → unauthenticated RCE. Detection = confirm the vulnerable template endpoint + version; NO OGNL expression that changes state or executes commands is sent.

probes.description: text-inline.vm reachable (200/other, Velocity/Confluence markers) confirms the CVE-2023-22527 OGNL template surface is exposed. Endpoint fingerprint only — no OGNL/command injection payload sent (detection-only per Rule 5).
